refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is crowded with patients and medical staff, with many people wearing face masks. The room appears to be filled beyond its capacity.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see the waiting room overcrowded with patients and staff. It was difficult to maintain social distancing and I felt uncomfortable waiting for my appointment. The hospital should consider improving the waiting area to accommodate more patients comfortably.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, it's really uncomfortable and hard to social distance with so many people around.
